title: Stakeholder Outcomes, Authorization, Ethics, Privacy, and Evidence · Code Recall
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs stakeholder outcomes, authorization, ethics, privacy, and evidence from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for authorized stakeholder and evidence charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Define the stakeholder decision, users, page population, evidence, success, failure, review cadence, and observable value before choosing crawler technology.
Record who controls the target, what access is authorized, which identities and paths are permitted, and who can pause or revoke the crawl.
Separate technical policy from terms, contracts, copyright, privacy, and jurisdiction questions and route uncertain cases to qualified review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review site-quality team handles case 3159 during a clean package and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the crawl charter on authorization, stakeholder value, minimized data, and honest evidence limits; personal data must remain minimized and redacted; then change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate deterministic model, parser, local-server, controlled-site, browser-render, load, privacy, accessibility, legal-review, and production evidence.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A successful request and CSV file prove a crawler is correct and acceptable.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate deterministic model, parser, local-server, controlled-site, browser-render, load, privacy, accessibility, legal-review, and production evidence. Artifact under review: authorized stakeholder and evidence charter.

options.text: The Evidence Boundaries record says authorized stakeholder and evidence charter looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Evidence Boundaries.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof. This does not satisfy Evidence Boundaries for authorized stakeholder and evidence charter.
The record names the assumption, applies Evidence Boundaries, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate deterministic model, parser, local-server, controlled-site, browser-render, load, privacy, accessibility, legal-review, and production evidence.
